reviews.originalComment: Hotel nya bersih, nyaman, pelayanan bagus..saran nya waktu malam lampu ke area bawah agak lebih terang lagi.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, comfortable, and the service is good.. my suggestion is that the lights in the lower area should be a bit brighter at night.
reviews.roomTypeName: Family Room with Side Sea View

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya bagus, pemandangan juga cantik..cuman minus sedikit tentang keamanan ruangan, karena ini family room sebaiknya di cek kembali pagar, tangga, pintu dan lantai papan, dilakukan perawatan berkala terhadap fasilitas. Karrna ada beberapa besi yang sudah berkarat dan papan yang sudah lapuk
reviews.reviewComments: The place is nice, the view is beautiful.. just a little lacking in room security, because this is a family room it should be checked again for the railing, stairs, doors, and floorboards, with regular maintenance done on the facilities. Because there are several rusty iron parts and some rotting boards.
reviews.roomTypeName: Family Room with Side Sea View

reviews.reviewComments: tempatnya bagus cantik dan bersih..suasananya aman dan tenang...layanan staffnya bagus..
reviews.roomTypeName: Family Room with Side Sea View

reviews.reviewComments: Value for money...nice view..friendly and helpful staff...
reviews.roomTypeName: Family Room with Side Sea View

reviews.reviewComments: Lokasinya dekat bgt dengan gua sarang. Kamar dan pemandangannya bener2 real pict bagus banget. Bisa liat sunset dan sunrise di tepi laut dari kamar langsung. Peralatan mandi lengkap tersedia. Snorkelingnya lbh murah 30 rb. Setiap menginap 2 mlm dpt gratis 1 permainan outbond. Ga ada restoran tp bisa titip dibelikan, nasi ayam penyetnya recommended.
reviews.roomTypeName: Family Room with Side Sea View
